⚠️ Be careful with $XVM.

This project is being pushed by influencers like @CryptoSage26 and @Davincij15, both of whom have been called out for scamming multiple times in the past. Bubblemaps shows an interconnected web of scam among top wallets, and GMGN flags 1,000+ fresh wallets—classic signs of bundling and inorganic holders.

Proceed with caution. The KOL history plus the on-chain setup make this a high-risk buy. As always, DYOR before entering any coin, project, or trade. Stay safe! 🔍

01:51
Crypto Rug Muncher
We bring new holders to $CRM and $cryptorugmunch by pushing nonstop—this is a community-run project, and community action is everything. If you’re active in crypto, talk about us daily: quote tweets, replies, threads—keep our name in the conversation. When you see a post worth raiding, drop it in our X community and Telegram so we can swarm it fast. Jump into comments with value—share why you’re here, what we’re building, and how we’re different.

I’m grinding behind the scenes to build the strongest foundation possible with regular, transparent updates and an attempt at real utility—but this only works if we all show up. Today, mention $CRM and $cryptorugmunch in a post, share one raid target in our chats, and bring one new person into the community. Let’s push together.

X Community: https://x.com/i/communities/1959446652802236744

Telegram Community: https://t.me/cryptorugmuncher

00:08, 1.6 MB
Congratulations to @retarded771—winner of our meme contest! Please DM me your wallet address to receive $100 worth of $CRM. While a few other posts showed more engagement, much of it appeared inorganic and was therefore disqualified. The contest prioritized organic interaction, and the final decision was mine to make. If you didn’t win this time, please keep an eye out for our next contest. Thank you to everyone who participated!

Crypto Rug Muncher
Most projects stress over daily price swings, but $CRM holders welcome them. Why? Because 50% of trading fees earned by the project are reinvested into building next‑gen security tools to protect retail crypto traders. More market activity means more fees, more funding for what we are building, and more value flowing back into the ecosystem.

In short, volatility isn’t a threat for $CRM holders—it’s fuel. $CRM: buy, hold, and trade with confidence.

What we, as a community, can do is support it within our budget, share it widely, and gain visibility.

22:54
Crypto Rug Muncher
$MITCH vs $CRM — 1H chart. Both are creator tokens, but they’re set up very differently. $MITCH was reportedly 80% bundled by banned X KOL @idrawline. $CRM, on the other hand, launched with no bundles and no insider involvement.

$MITCH is running on vibes, while $CRM has pledged to build next‑gen scam‑fighting tools for degens, reinvesting 50% of trading fees back into development. Of course, I’d love to see our coin pump more, but the chart shows $CRM has been far less extractive, and confidence in the project has held steady. That’s the power of community.

Bottom line: quick hype fades, but aligned incentives and transparent building win over time. $CRM is proving that when there are no insider games and fees fund real tools for traders, trust compounds. We’ll keep building, the community will keep showing up, and the chart will follow. We will win.
❤ 22 👍 1 🥰 1

01:39
Crypto Rug Muncher
Social analysis is crucial when evaluating crypto projects. As I mentioned in yesterday’s AMA, my take on $XVM is a good example: by reviewing the kinds of projects @CryptoSage26 had previously backed, I could infer the type of project they’d likely run today. From there, it was just a matter of confirming on-chain—and the data matched my expectations.

Our upcoming app will put social metrics front and center. You’ll be able to see whether KOLs have a history of bad behavior and how their past projects are performing now. This context will help traders spot patterns, avoid traps, and make better decisions.

If you believe in tools that protect retail and improve transparency, support a creator building for the crypto community. Support $CRM and $cryptorugmunch.

21:50
Crypto Rug Muncher
I’m excited to share that we’ve been officially registered and approved in Wyoming as Rug Munch Media LLC. To my knowledge, $CRM and $cryptorugmunch are the first creator coins to take this route.

Why it matters:

• We’ll leverage the LLC to deliver a suite of next‑gen scam‑detection tools tailored for crypto degens.
• We plan to evolve into a Wyoming DAO, giving token holders a real voice in the direction of this project.
• Forming an LLC signals how serious we are about this project—we’re here to build, not grab a quick buck.

If you want creator tokens that are serious about protecting the community and shipping useful tools, consider $CRM and $cryptorugmunch. Our project is here to build for years, not weeks. We are the utility-backed conviction play you’ve been searching for.

CAs:

$CRM

00:49
Crypto Rug Muncher
Folks, if you’re holding $CRM or $cryptorugmunch, know this: I’m not sitting on my laurels or coasting on fees—I’m building. I’m a one‑man team doing as much as I can, as fast as I can. Today I’m finalizing site copy so our designer can ship the mobile version to me, and I’m spinning up official channels on Twitch, Kick, and Rumble alongside our YouTube. Near term, I plan to expand AMAs into at least twice‑weekly broadcasts to cover current crypto events and provide live analysis on projects you care about. These broadcasts will stream live across all platforms at once so we can get as many eyes on the project as possible. As always, a reasonable portion of any creator revenue I generate will go right back into the project to keep fueling growth.

While I’m building, the biggest thing is keeping us in the conversation. Here’s how you can help right now: share the good word about $CRM and $cryptorugmunch on your socials, tag us so we get more reach, and drop any solid content to the mods so we can line up raids. Keep the ticker visible in threads, jump into news posts with thoughtful replies, and say hello to new folks in the chats.

I’ll be ramping up scam coverage, red‑flag education for crypto newcomers, and live breakdowns to protect traders and prove we’re a straight‑shooting, utility‑first project. Stick with me, give me a bit of creative runway before you write this off, and let’s keep the project in the conversation while I deliver what I have promised to the community. Please keep the faith.
